projectDescription: ShriKrishnaSteelWorks executed a Hygiene Compliance Project at Pune, Maharashtra for a prominent IT/Corporate company. The project included supply, installation and commissioning of 129 food processing equipment units fabricated from GI Steel steel with Hot Dip Galvanized finish. Covering 19,021 sq ft of processing area, all machines were installed with compliance to food safety and ISO standards. Total steel consumed was 7.8 MT. Project completed in 250 days.
projectFeatures: Low noise operation, Easy maintenance, Energy efficient, Stainless steel body, Safety guards included

projectDescription: We undertook a prestigious Lobby Renovation at Mumbai, Maharashtra for a leading Government group. All furniture items were fabricated using Carbon Steel material with Powder Coated surface treatment to meet the property's premium brand standards. 383 custom items were delivered via Supply Only mode by a 30-member team in 236 days. The client awarded us a 4.5-star rating for design quality and project execution.
projectFeatures: Corrosion free, Scratch resistant, Durable upholstery, Designer look

clientTestimonial: Will definitely work with ShriKrishna again.
projectDescription: A Landscape Project was executed by ShriKrishnaSteelWorks in Dhule, Maharashtra for the Education sector. 152 pieces of park and outdoor equipment were fabricated in SS 316L steel with PVD Coated finish, ensuring UV and corrosion resistance for long outdoor life. Our 13-member team completed installation in 433 days as per municipal specifications and site drawings.
projectFeatures: Galvanized coating, Durable anchoring, BIS compliant, Weather resistant, Powder coated

projectDescription: A prestigious Pool Railing project was executed at Ratnagiri, Maharashtra. Using SS 202 material with PVD Coated surface treatment, we fabricated and installed 112 linear metres of railing with a total steel weight of 25.3 MT. The installation was completed by our 45-member team in 123 days. The client acknowledged our quality workmanship and attention to safety norms.
projectFeatures: Low maintenance, Weather resistant, Safety compliant, Aesthetic design, Smooth weld joints, Anti-slip base

projectDescription: We successfully completed a Kitchen Fitment at Mumbai, Maharashtra, fabricating 350 kitchen trolley units in SS 430 steel for a FMCG facility. The Hairline Finish finish ensures easy cleaning and corrosion resistance suitable for high-usage commercial kitchen environments. Our team of 22 workers fabricated and installed all units within 89 days as per client drawings and hygiene specifications.
projectFeatures: Stackable design, FSSAI compliant, Hygienic surface, Non-slip base, Custom size available, Food grade steel, Easy-roll casters

projectDescription: We undertook a Turnkey Furniture project for a leading Government establishment in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Covering a built-up area of 3,921 sq ft, the scope included design, fabrication and Fabrication at Site of furniture items. Premium SS 304 material was used throughout with Powder Coated surface treatment to ensure long-lasting performance in the Government environment. The project was completed in 399 days and has been recognized as a portfolio reference.
projectFeatures: Easy assembly, Durable frame, High load capacity, Modular design

projectDescription: A complex Industrial Shed was completed by ShriKrishnaSteelWorks for a Industrial client in Pune, Maharashtra. Involving 450 structural components fabricated from SS 316L material with Powder Coated coating, the structure covers 20,776 sq ft. All fabrication and erection was completed to IS standards within 28 days. The project has been shortlisted as a reference for pre-engineered building excellence in Maharashtra.
projectFeatures: High tensile strength, IS 2062 steel, Custom span, Seismic zone compliant, Fire resistant coating, Pre-engineered design, Long span capability
